title_en: The Windows 95 user interface: A case study in usability engineering (1996)
title_cn: Windows 95用户界面：可用性工程案例研究（1996）
summary_en: This classic ACM paper documents the usability engineering practices behind Windows 95's interface design. It covers systematic user testing, issue tracking, and iterative refinement that established principles still relevant to modern UI/UX development.
summary_cn: 这篇经典ACM论文记录了Windows 95界面设计背后的可用性工程实践。涵盖系统化用户测试、问题追踪和迭代优化流程，这些原则至今对现代UI/UX开发仍具有重要参考价值。

summary_en: A software engineering methodology that combines three proven paradigms into an AI-orchestrated pipeline. VSDD proposes a structured approach where AI agents help bridge specifications and implementation through verification-driven workflows, potentially transforming how developers write and validate code.
summary_cn: 一种将三种成熟范式融合为AI编排流水线的软件工程方法论。VSDD提出了一种结构化方法，让AI代理帮助弥合规范与实现之间的差距，通过验证驱动的工作流，可能改变开发者编写和验证代码的方式。

title_en: Qwen3.5 122B and 35B models offer Sonnet 4.5 performance on local computers
title_cn: Qwen3.5 122B 和 35B 模型在本地电脑上提供 Sonnet 4.5 级别性能
summary_en: Alibaba's new open-source Qwen3.5-Medium series delivers competitive performance rivaling Claude Sonnet 4.5 at a fraction of the cost. The 35B-A3B model notably surpasses larger predecessors like Qwen3-235B in knowledge and visual reasoning benchmarks, demonstrating that improved architecture and data quality matter more than raw model size.
summary_cn: 阿里巴巴新开源的 Qwen3.5-Medium 系列以极低的成本提供了与 Claude Sonnet 4.5 相当的性能。35B-A3B 模型在知识和视觉推理基准测试中甚至超越了更大的前代模型 Qwen3-235B，证明了改进的架构和数据质量比原始模型规模更重要。

title_en: Show HN: Now I Get It – Translate scientific papers into interactive webpages
title_cn: Show HN: Now I Get It - 将科学论文转化为交互式网页
summary_en: A tool that converts scientific PDFs into shareable, interactive web pages that explain complex research in plain language. This bridges AI-powered content understanding with modern frontend development to make academic research more accessible.
summary_cn: 一款将科学PDF转换为可分享的交互式网页的工具，用通俗语言解释复杂研究内容。它结合了AI驱动的内容理解和现代前端开发技术，使学术研究更易理解。

summary_en: An exceptional interactive visual guide explaining how diffusion models generate images from text. The article demystifies latent space, embeddings, random seeds, guidance scales, and the denoising process through hands-on interactive demonstrations. It's a masterclass in making complex AI concepts accessible without sacrificing technical depth.
summary_cn: 一份出色的交互式视觉指南，解释扩散模型如何从文本生成图像。文章通过动手交互式演示揭开了潜在空间、嵌入、随机种子、引导尺度和去噪过程的神秘面纱。这是一堂在不牺牲技术深度的情况下让复杂AI概念易于理解的精品课程。

title_en: Stop Burning Your Context Window — We Built Context Mode
title_cn: 停止浪费你的上下文窗口——我们构建了上下文模式
summary_en: A deep dive into Context Mode, an MCP server that reduces Claude Code context consumption by 98%. The article explains the sandbox architecture with isolated subprocesses, SQLite FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and practical implementation details. It demonstrates how proper tool design can extend AI coding sessions from 30 minutes to 3 hours.
summary_cn: 深入探讨Context Mode，一个将Claude Code上下文消耗减少98%的MCP服务器。文章解释了具有隔离子进程的沙盒架构、带有BM25排名的SQLite FTS5知识库，以及实际实现细节。它展示了适当的工具设计如何将AI编程会话从30分钟延长到3小时。

title_en: Obsidian Sync now has a headless client
title_cn: Obsidian Sync现已支持无头客户端
summary_en: Obsidian released an official headless CLI client for Obsidian Sync, enabling users to synchronize vaults from command line without the desktop app. This enables automation workflows, CI/CD integration, and server-side syncing for developers.
summary_cn: Obsidian发布了Obsidian Sync的官方无头CLI客户端，用户无需桌面应用即可从命令行同步知识库。这为开发者实现了自动化工作流、CI/CD集成和服务器端同步功能。

title_en: Addressing Antigravity Bans and Reinstating Access
summary_en: Google's official response to mass bans affecting OpenClaw users on their Antigravity AI coding platform. Varun Mohan cited 'massive increase in malicious usage' degrading service quality. The post outlines an appeal process for automatic reinstatement and clarifies ToS violations related to third-party tool usage.
summary_cn: Google官方回应Antigravity平台大规模封禁OpenClaw用户事件。Varun Mohan表示检测到'恶意使用激增'导致服务质量下降。文章说明了申诉自动恢复流程，并澄清了与第三方工具使用相关的服务条款违规问题。

title_cn: 使用 LLM 进行确定性编程
summary_en: This article explores the challenge of achieving deterministic outputs when using LLMs for coding. Unlike humans who consistently follow patterns, LLMs can produce inconsistent results even with temperature set to zero. The author advocates for using lints, tests, and guardrails to ensure code quality and consistency when working with AI coding agents.
summary_cn: 本文探讨了在使用 LLM 进行编程时实现确定性输出的挑战。与人类能够持续遵循模式不同，即使温度参数设为零，LLM 也可能产生不一致的结果。作者主张使用代码检查、测试和护栏机制来确保 AI 编程助手生成代码的质量和一致性。

title_en: Building a Minimal Transformer for 10-digit Addition
title_cn: 构建用于十位数加法的极简 Transformer
summary_en: This technical deep-dive explores the challenge of building the smallest possible transformer model capable of adding two 10-digit numbers with over 99% accuracy. The project demonstrates fundamental transformer mechanics and optimization techniques, offering valuable insights for understanding how neural networks handle arithmetic operations at a minimal scale.
summary_cn: 这项技术性深入研究探讨了构建能够用超过 99% 准确率相加两个十位数字的最小 Transformer 模型的挑战。该项目展示了基础 Transformer 机制和优化技术，为理解神经网络如何以最小规模处理算术运算提供了宝贵见解。

title_en: The whole thing was a scam
summary_en: Gary Marcus alleges corruption in AI government contracts, claiming OpenAI's Sam Altman secretly worked on a Pentagon deal while publicly supporting Anthropic's Dario Amodei. The article suggests political donations influenced AI procurement decisions, raising concerns about cronyism in the emerging AI industry.
summary_cn: Gary Marcus指控AI政府合同存在腐败，声称OpenAI的Sam Altman在公开支持Anthropic的Dario Amodei的同时，秘密推进与五角大楼的交易。文章暗示政治捐款影响了AI采购决策，引发对新兴AI产业中任人唯亲现象的担忧。

summary_en: A thought-provoking comparison between piloting Boeing 747s and modern software development with AI coding assistants. The author, a former 747 pilot turned software engineer, draws parallels between aviation safety systems and human-AI collaboration in coding, arguing that effective use of coding agents requires deep domain expertise rather than replacing it.
summary_cn: 一篇将驾驶波音747飞机与使用AI编程助手进行现代软件开发进行类比的引人深思的文章。作者曾是747飞行员，后转为软件工程师，他将航空安全系统与编程中的人机协作进行类比，认为有效使用编程智能体需要深厚的领域专业知识，而非取代它。
